use_case_description: Learn about a physician's diagnosis of a medical condition and accompanying treatment plan (including medications, dietary/behavioral instructions, etc.).
cq_format: single-select MCQs with 5 options and one correct answer
additional_prompts: Across Bloom's taxnonomy of 3 cognitive processes (remembering, understanding, and applying), make 6 CQ each, totally 18 questions for the CQ section. Do not overlap in the content tested for each question; it's okay if some questions deepen the tested concept in previous questions.
